inputs.label: Velocity Factor
inputs.businessContext: Velocity factor of wire or cable. 0.95 for bare copper, 0.66 for insulated wire

businessContext_i18n.en: Velocity factor of wire or cable. 0.95 for bare copper, 0.66 for insulated wire
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tel veya kablonun hız faktörü. Çıplak bakır için 0.95, yalıtımlı tel için 0.66.
businessContext_i18n.de: Verkürzungsfaktor von Draht oder Kabel. 0,95 für blankes Kupfer, 0,66 für isolierten Draht
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de vélocité du fil ou du câble. 0,95 pour le cuivre nu, 0,66 pour le fil isolé
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de velocidad del cable o conductor. 0.95 para cobre desnudo, 0.66 para cable aislado.

inputs.label: Wavelength Fraction
inputs.businessContext: Fraction of wavelength. Use 0.5 for half-wave dipole, 1.0 for full-wave

businessContext_i18n.en: Fraction of wavelength. Use 0.5 for half-wave dipole, 1.0 for full-wave
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dalga boyunun kesri. Yarım dalga dipol için 0.5, tam dalga için 1.0 kullanın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Bruchteil der Wellenlänge. Verwenden Sie 0,5 für einen Halbwellendipol, 1,0 für einen Vollwellendipol
businessContext_i18n.fr: Fraction de longueur d'onde. Utilisez 0,5 pour un dipôle demi-onde, 1,0 pour une onde entière
businessContext_i18n.es: Fracción de longitud de onda. Use 0.5 para dipolo de media onda, 1.0 para onda completa.

businessContext_i18n.fr: 0 pour les pieds, 1 pour les mètres

inputs.label: End Effect Correction
inputs.businessContext: Adjustment factor for end effect. Use 0.95-0.98 for practical shortening

businessContext_i18n.en: Adjustment factor for end effect. Use 0.95-0.98 for practical shortening
businessContext_i18n.tr: Uç etkisi için ayar faktörü. Pratik kısaltma için 0.95-0.98 kullanın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anpassungsfaktor für den Endeffekt. Verwenden Sie 0,95–0,98 für praktische Verkürzung
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur d'ajustement pour l'effet d'extrémité. Utilisez 0,95-0,98 pour un raccourcissement pratique
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de ajuste por efecto de extremo. Use 0.95-0.98 para acortamiento práctico.

formulas.lengthInSelectedUnit: unitSelection === 0 ? 492 * velocityFactor * wavelengthFraction * endEffectCorrection / frequency : 300 * velocityFactor * wavelengthFraction * endEffectCorrection / frequency

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
